chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. D-1217 of 2026 Alongwith Const. Petition No. D-1347 of 2026 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of CMA No.5652/2026 3. For hearing of main case 17.03.2026 Mr. Muhammad Akhtar Shoro, Advocate for the petitioners alongwith petitioner Iqbal S/o Bachal M/s. Hakim Ali Shaikh and Sageer Ahmed Abbasi, Additional Advocates General, Sindh alongwith SIP Liaqat Ali, P.S Gharo, District Thatta and Ms. Shazia Abid, Assistant Director/Incharge Darul Aman, Hyderabad ---------------------- Mr. Ayaz Ali Solangi, Advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of Respondent No.5/Father of the alleged detenue Mst. Sonia @ Jannat, taken on record. Pursuant to directions contained in previous order in C.P No.D-1347 of 2026 Ms. Shazia Abid, Incharge Darul Aman, Hyderabad has produced the alleged detenue Mst. Sonia @ Jannat in Court today. On examination, the alleged detenue submits that she has converted into Islam with core of her heart and without any coercive or compulsion and has entered into Nikkah with Iqbal S/o Bachal i.e. petitioner in C.P No.D-1217 of 2026. On a query being asked by the Court, she categorically stated that she would go with her husband instead of her father namely Kanwar S/o Mohan (Respondent No.5). In view of statement of the alleged detenue Mst. Sonia @ Jannat both these petitions are disposed of. Custody of Mst. Sonia @ Jannat is returned to Darul Aman, Hyderabad through Ms. Shazia Abid with directions to handover her custody to her husband against a bond ought to be executed by Iqbal in the sum of Rs.500,000/-.

Sonia @ Jannat is returned to Darul Aman, Hyderabad through Ms. Shazia Abid with directions to handover her custody to her husband against a bond ought to be executed by Iqbal in the sum of Rs.500,000/-. JUDGE HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE B-K Soomro
